safety_use_cases.label: Cross-site safety incident trend monitoring and leaderboards
safety_use_cases.description: View incident trends by safety incident type across all sites, including leaders/laggards, to understand where safety risks are increasing or decreasing.

evidence.quote: you'll see your pit-to-pit proximity events, you'll see total events in that trend, a bit more of like a visual on how you're trending on that.
evidence.speaker: Keegan York <fake.keegan.york@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: who has the largest positive trend, so who is seeing the most decrease, who has the largest negative trend, so who has the most increasing in this time frame, and then just total incident count overall.
evidence.speaker: Keegan York <fake.keegan.york@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Use incident videos for safety training and coaching
safety_use_cases.description: Leverage incident clips to coach safe behaviors and show examples of 'what good looks like.'

evidence.quote: I may hit create action. I'm going to hit train and retain the team on proper lift.
evidence.speaker: Keegan York <fake.keegan.york@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: one of the things we know our customers love to do is leverage these videos as like a, here's what good looks like, or here's what, you know, opportunity looks like and we need to do that.
evidence.speaker: Keegan York <fake.keegan.york@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Measure impact of safety actions with markers on incident trends
safety_use_cases.description: Automatically mark when actions are completed and correlate with incident trend lines to see if safety risk is decreasing; escalate to engineering or process changes if not.

evidence.quote: when an action is completed, you will be able to, that will automatically add a marker.
evidence.speaker: Keegan York <fake.keegan.york@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: are the actions that the team is taking, is it making an impact?
evidence.speaker: Keegan York <fake.keegan.york@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: if you aren't seeing the, you know, risk reduction that you hope for, that's a great opportunity to engage with the site leader or whoever and say, hey, we need to try something else. We need to, you know, maybe it's an engineering control or a process change. The coaching's not working
evidence.speaker: Keegan York <fake.keegan.york@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Annotate videos to highlight safety concerns not auto-detected
safety_use_cases.description: Freeze frames and circle items in videos to call out additional safety issues beyond what the AI highlights.

evidence.quote: in videos, being able to use a pen to circle things, like to freeze a frame and circle things, because again, it's not always about what
evidence.speaker: Kelsey Parker <fake.kelsey.parker@southtrackdynamics.com>

evidence.quote: But the Voxel camera's picking up and highlighting, but it's other things that I'm seeing in the videos that I want to also call out that would make that easier.
evidence.speaker: Kelsey Parker <fake.kelsey.parker@southtrackdynamics.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Assign and track corrective safety actions with owners, due dates, and reporting
safety_use_cases.description: Create actionable follow-ups from incidents with a single accountable owner, subscribers, due dates, and reporting on totals and average time to complete.

evidence.quote: we heard a lot of feedback that you want like that single person to be know that they're accountable for carrying out this action.
evidence.speaker: Keegan York <fake.keegan.york@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: the final thing here, which is new. is the due date.
evidence.speaker: Keegan York <fake.keegan.york@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: you're going to see the totals, how many were assigned, how many were completed, and that average completion time.
evidence.speaker: Keegan York <fake.keegan.york@voxelai.com>

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Executive all-sites dashboard with custom date ranges for weekly leadership reporting
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Enable custom date ranges and a rolled-up executive view to support weekly dashboards and discussions with regional leadership.

evidence.quote: be able to put in specific time frame and not just look at like the last about a week or the last about a month or the last month, but to be able to specifically look at, I want to see Wednesday to Saturday or something, you know, is specific.
evidence.speaker: Kelsey Parker <fake.kelsey.parker@southtrackdynamics.com>

evidence.quote: I want to look at a weekly dashboard that I go to our, you know, our regional leadership team with and say, here's the things I'm seeing.

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Report subscriptions and exports (PDF/CSV/PPT) for stakeholder sharing
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Subscribe to receive weekly summaries and export dashboards as PDFs, raw CSV data, or editable PowerPoint slides for broader reporting.

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Embed incident videos in presentation decks

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Assign and track actions with accountability and reporting
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Use an actions workflow with a single assignee, subscribers, due dates, and reports on counts and average completion time to manage follow-ups.

evidence.quote: We've switched this to being multiple to just single because we heard a lot of feedback that you want like that single person to be know that they're accountable for carrying out this action.

evidence.quote: you're going to see the totals, how many were assigned, how many were completed, and that average completion time.

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Reminders for past-due actions
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Send nudges when action due dates pass so assignees are reminded to complete overdue items.

evidence.quote: since we've, you know, this instances where we assign a due date, what happens when that due date passes? is, question is, is... And no, actually, is there reminders?
evidence.speaker: Kelsey Parker <fake.kelsey.parker@southtrackdynamics.com>

evidence.quote: The one thing we don't have that you said that we've heard already from a lot of folks is reminders for past due. Like, how do we nudge someone when something's past due? We do foresee that being in the next phase of this.
